Title: Website Desgin & Hosting: Design & UX Enhancements
Notes:
To further optimize DrFace.com, the following actions should be implemented:

  1. Update Plugins: Ensure all plugins are up to date to improve performance, security, and compatibility.

    • Optimize XML Sitemaps: Ensure the sitemaps are up-to-date for improved crawlability.

    • Enhance Caching: Implement better caching strategies to speed up page load times.

    • Improve Image Load Speeds: Optimize images to reduce load times and improve overall performance.

    • Ensure Mobile Responsiveness: Verify that the site is fully optimized for mobile devices.

    • Fix Broken Links: Resolve any broken links to improve user experience and crawl efficiency.

    • Strengthen Internal Linking: Improve internal linking to enhance site navigation and crawlability, boosting overall SEO.
